title: squilla maritima
intro: Squilla maritima, also known as sea squill or sea onion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Liliaceae. It is a bulbous plant that grows in coastal areas and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions. Squilla maritima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
